title: オーダーメイドで特別な

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a day out with Copano Rickey, we're
headed back to the academy. Or at least, we
were supposed to be...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Ta-daa! The super-lucky feng shui tour is now underway!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ushered from behind, with no idea what's going
on, I board a shuttle bus with Copano Rickey. It
seems like we're the only passengers.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I'll be your tour guide for the day. Copano
Rickey's the name! Thank you for joining me!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I'm taking you on a tour of lucky spots based on
your primary star! Come on, it's going to be a
blast!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
First stop is the observation deck! I think you'll
resonate really well with the view!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Take in the fabulous scenery, and don't forget to
grab an orange-colored item while you're here to
boost your mood!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Fear not, though! You needn't search far! I
prepared this orange item for you! It's even got
the observation deck's logo on it!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
You're welcome! ♪ Make sure to carry it with you
wherever you go!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The east is radiating good fortune! It also
contains an incredible power spot!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Hm, haha. Ah, it's nothing!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Well, I guess it doesn't hurt to ask! How're you
feeling right now?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Greeeat! Then it's onto the next spot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey continues leading me on her
surprise tour. She stops every so often to ask how
I'm feeling, but gives no clue about her
intentions.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Okaaay, last stop! Here we can enjoy a dip in the
hot springs and some tasty food!

text_block_list.name: Old Man
text_block_list.text:
I've been waiting for you. Thank you so much for
helping us the other day.

text_block_list.name: Old Man
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to your help rearranging the place, our
customers have been steadily increasing. Please,
let us show our heartfelt appreciation as a way of
thanks.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The folks here organized the shuttle bus and
prepared food!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: All for you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Yep!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
You know how I want to use feng shui to make
everyone feel happier and luckier, right?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It's difficult to do on my own. But right when I'm
starting to feel frustrated, you always show up to
help!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
When I'm just short of achieving my goal, you're
there to give me that final boost!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
So, I figured, before I make everyone else happy,
I have to bring a smile to the person who's always
at my side!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to do something special for you, so I
asked the inn folks for advice, and they agreed to
help out! They even chartered a bus for us!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I know I'm always dragging you into things, and I
hardly ever stop to say thanks... So, that's why I'm
taking this opportunity!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I hope you'll continue to support me!
choice_data_list: You do tend to drag me into things...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Yay! You felt the same!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! As long as I'm your trainee, I guarantee to
keep you happy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's bound to continue doing the same for tons
of people from here on out. I feel a renewed
determination to support her until the very end.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Ack! I really feel bad about that, you know...
choice_data_list: But, that's one of your good points.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
...So, you're not dropping me?! Oh, phew! I was so
panicked for nothing!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Well then! I have no reason to hold back! Brace
yourself, because I'm going to drag you into all
the things I get up to!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suppose that's just how she'll continue to go on
making people happy. I feel a renewed
determination to support her until the very end.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Huh, why are you crying? Were you really that
touched?! Ohhh, I'm so happy!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I was aiming to get a smile, but this will do
just as well!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, from here on out, I hope to see you laugh
tons and cry tons too! Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suppose that's just how she'll continue to go on
making people happy. I feel a renewed
determination to support her until the very end.
